australian_relation: ABC public article with distinct source-stated ghost narratives attached to named sites in York, Western Australia.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page names Settlers Hotel in York as the site of Mrs Inkpen's ghost; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Settlers Inn result.
evidence_summary: Just down the road from Basil and his castle, guests at the Settlers Hotel have experienced their fair share of paranormal activity. The hotel's general manager, Stacey Slater, says long-time resident Mrs Inkpen likes to play tricks on staff. "We have a doorbell for the kitchen that goes off for orders, and it will go off late at night when no one's here," she said. Settlers Hotel in York is believed to be home to the ghost of Mrs Inkpen.
publication_or_organisation: Ghosts of Castle, Settlers hotels and Old York Hospital spook and delight tourists in WA town; ABC Midwest & Wheatbelt
title: ghost in Settlers Inn Mrs Inkpen ghost

australian_relation: ABC public article with distinct source-stated ghost narratives attached to named sites in York, Western Australia.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page names Old York Hospital in York and reports paranormal figures there; exact hospital coordinate did not verify, so the representative public flag uses the state-checked York town result.
evidence_summary: Old York Hospital sits just around the corner from Basil and Mrs Inkpen, and is said to be one of the most haunted buildings in WA. Staff who worked there when it was operational were reportedly too frightened to walk upstairs alone. It was eventually turned into a hostel, and people who stayed there during the 1980s reported being set-upon by paranormal figures.
publication_or_organisation: Ghosts of Castle, Settlers hotels and Old York Hospital spook and delight tourists in WA town; ABC Midwest & Wheatbelt
title: figures in Old York Hospital paranormal figures
